text: あなたなら受けてくれると信じてたわ！

依頼にもある通り、耐熱性に優れた
素材で、なおかつ筒状になっている
ものがいいらしいの。

条件が条件なだけに難しいとは
思うけど

Perfect! I posted that request hoping that
you'd be the one to pick it up.

Just like I wrote up there, I'm looking for
something that's not only incredibly resilient
to heat, but also cylindrical.

I know that might be a bit much to ask, but
here I am asking anyway!
